title: How a perfectly even universe grew galaxies - Adam Brown
summary: A YouTube video featuring cosmologist Adam Brown discussing how galaxies formed in the universe despite initial conditions being nearly uniform. The episode is hosted by Dwarkesh Patel on his podcast channel.
